bear_case: We have scored eighteen months of visible, legible, well-written engineering and called it conviction. But visibility is the one signal every other fund also has - this founder is on the front page, publishes benchmarks, and answers criticism in public. There is no information asymmetry here, so we will pay a market price for a company whose core technique is already published in a preprint that any serving framework can implement. The self-correction we weighted so heavily is admirable and is also what a person does when their number is about to be checked in public. Two people, one allocator, no pricing model, and a much larger engineering surface ahead of them than behind.
weakest_evidence: The market axis carries confidence 0.61 against founder confidence 0.88. We are extrapolating commercial potential from developer adoption, which historically converts badly for infrastructure libraries.
148 dependent repositories is a count of imports, not of users who would pay if the license changed tomorrow.
Two production users are named by the team and were not independently confirmed.
The technique is published with a public benchmark harness, which is excellent practice and also a complete implementation guide for a well-resourced competitor.
load_bearing_claim: That a paged KV-cache allocator is a company rather than a feature of somebody else's serving framework. If it is a feature, the technical excellence is real, the outcome is an acquihire, and our return does not clear the fund.
spread_note: Narrow founder spread, wide market spread. Both readings of this file agree completely about the engineer and not at all about the business.
what_would_change_my_mind: A stated commercial model. Any model - hosted, enterprise licensing, support - would move the market axis more than another release would.
One of the major serving frameworks depending on this rather than reimplementing it. That is the whole bull case in one observable event.
Evidence of a third hire, which would test whether the disaggregated-prefill direction is staffed or aspirational.
